prompts: /plan `When running the app using 'bun run dev' and using the localhost domain our code should realize we are running on a dev domain. We are logged in with the user 'andre@fortinmedia.net' with a system admin role. The side nav-bar is not showing the actual sidebar menu items for the current agency/location we are logged in as OR the menu links are not going to the correct location because of the dev domain localhost.`
